title: El filibusterismo
writer: Adrian Cristobal, Jose Rizal, Jose Flores Sibal
actors: Pancho Magalona, Charito Solis, Teody Belarmino
plot: Juan Crisostomo Ibarra has changed his name and identity to rich jeweler Simoun. In disguise, he travels the world amassing wealth, which he intends to use to topple the corrupt and abusive regime in his native land. But Simoun's ...
